S.FORM: MiloЕЎ BabiДҮ sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 11, MiloЕЎ BabiДҮ, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: milo* ОІaОІi* s~Й•raral Д§jaК”ЙЈa s~Й•is~Й•juw na nОІa, wal malaxmis~Й•uq qanij la. kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj ** nqu taj **, milo* ОІaОІi*, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
